title: Tiny Kitchens
description: Cozy, hand-illustrated explainers about the science and history of home cooking — warm, playful, sketchbook feel, for curious foodies and hobby cooks

scriptStyle.tone: warm, curious, and gently playful — like a friend explaining a kitchen secret over tea
scriptStyle.sentenceStyle: short and conversational with the occasional delighted aside
scriptStyle.hookStyle: open with a tiny everyday kitchen mystery the viewer has definitely wondered about
scriptStyle.pacing: relaxed but steady, building little 'aha' beats
scriptStyle.vocabulary: approachable everyday words, science terms gently unpacked, sensory food language
scriptStyle.episodeArchetype: one humble ingredient or technique unpacked through its science and history
